evals.name: add-key-both-locales
evals.prompt: Add a new translation key for a 'Terms accepted' success message on the signup page

assertions.text: Creates key auth.signup.termsAccepted (or similar) in BOTH en.json and fr.json, placed alphabetically within the auth.signup section, with appropriate English and French values

evals.name: interpolation-key
evals.prompt: I need to display 'Your session expires in {minutes} minutes' on the dashboard

assertions.text: Adds dashboard.sessionExpiring (or similar) with {minutes} interpolation to both locale files, uses t('dashboard.sessionExpiring', { minutes }) in the template

evals.name: fix-missing-french
evals.prompt: The French translation for error.auth.blocked is missing, fix it

assertions.text: Runs the parity check script or inspects fr.json, identifies the missing key, adds the French translation for error.auth.blocked in fr.json at the correct alphabetical position

evals.name: key-naming-guidance
evals.prompt: Where should I put a translation key for a new 'notifications' page title?

assertions.text: Recommends meta.notifications.title for the SEO title and a new notifications section (or similar) for page-specific strings, following the section inventory and naming conventions

evals.name: parity-check
evals.prompt: Check if the locale files are in sync

assertions.text: Runs python3 .claude/skills/translate/scripts/check_locales.py and reports the result (parity OK or lists mismatched keys)

evals.name: interpolation-confirm-dialog
evals.prompt: Add a confirmation dialog message for deleting a contact submission: 'Are you sure you want to delete the message from {name}?'

assertions.text: Adds contact.deleteConfirm.message (or similar) with {name} interpolation to both en.json and fr.json, ensures the {name} parameter appears in both translations, places key alphabetically
